user.title: Connect to camera.ui
user.description: Create an API token in camera.ui under Settings > Account > API tokens.

zeroconf_confirm.title: Connect to camera.ui
zeroconf_confirm.description: camera.ui was found at {host}. Create an API token in camera.ui under Settings > Account > API tokens and enter it here.

abort.already_configured: This camera.ui server is already configured.

ptz.name: PTZ
ptz.description: Control a camera's pan, tilt and zoom.

action.name: Action
action.description: continuous = keep moving, stop = halt, move = relative nudge, absolute = go to a position, preset = go to a named preset, home = go to home.

pan.name: Pan
pan.description: Horizontal amount. Speed for continuous, delta for move, position for absolute (-1 to 1, positive = right).

tilt.name: Tilt
tilt.description: Vertical amount. Speed for continuous, delta for move, position for absolute (-1 to 1, positive = up).

zoom.name: Zoom
zoom.description: Zoom amount. Speed for continuous, delta for move, position for absolute (-1 to 1, positive = in).

preset.name: Preset
preset.description: Preset name, for the preset action.
